evals.prompt: I just added a pagination utility to our API layer. Can you review the changes for any bugs or edge cases before I commit?
evals.expected_output: The reviewer identifies the Math.floor bug, explains that pages will be undercounted when total is not evenly divisible by pageSize, and suggests Math.ceil as the fix.
expectations: The review identifies Math.floor as incorrect for computing total pages
The review explains the consequence (wrong page count or inaccessible last page items)
The review suggests using Math.ceil instead

evals.prompt: I wrote a function to handle order processing — it marks the order as processing and sends a confirmation email. Please review it for bugs and quality issues.
evals.expected_output: The reviewer catches the missing await on db.orders.update(), explains the race condition it creates, and suggests adding await.
expectations: The review identifies the missing await on db.orders.update()
The review explains the consequence (update may not complete, race condition, or unhandled rejection)
The review suggests adding await to db.orders.update()

evals.prompt: I added a payment route to our Express app. Can you review the error handling and overall quality before this goes to code review?
evals.expected_output: The reviewer catches that the catch block sends no response to the client, explains the client will hang, and suggests adding a res.status(500) error response.
expectations: The review identifies that the catch block sends no HTTP response to the client
The review explains the consequence (client request hangs or times out)
The review suggests adding a res.status(500) error response in the catch block
